<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of potential tester candidates to the tester groups"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/tester-groups/{id}/potential-testers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gives back a paginated list of tester candidates.
